input.prompt: Is this patient safe to discharge today?

narrative_evidence_bundle.excerpt: Breathing improved. Afebrile. Tolerating oral meds. Likely discharge home later today if remains stable on room air.

O2 sat dropped to 82% on room air after approximately 20 feet and 6 stairs. Patient became visibly dyspneic. Patient stated, "I do not have oxygen at home tonight and my daughter cannot stay." Oxygen vendor cannot deliver concentrator until tomorrow morning. Patient lives alone on third-floor walk-up with 18 stairs.
Confirmed home oxygen delivery delayed until tomorrow morning. Daughter unavailable overnight and no alternate caregiver for first night home.

optional_context_metadata.explicit_task_goal: Detect hidden narrative contradiction affecting discharge safety.

output.decision_matrix_action: add cited hidden-risk blocker and escalate disposition

deterministic.summary: Verdict: READY. No active discharge blockers were detected in this assistive readiness review; final disposition remains with the clinical team.

hidden_risk_summary.summary: Structured baseline was ready from resting chart data, but note evidence shows exertional desaturation with dyspnea, unavailable home oxygen tonight, and no overnight caregiver support. This contradiction makes discharge home tonight unsafe.
hidden_risk_summary.false_positive_guardrail: Only findings tied to explicit narrative contradictions or discharge logistics barriers are emitted.

hidden_risk_findings.title: Exertional oxygen instability not visible in resting structured data
hidden_risk_findings.rationale: Narrative evidence documents exertional desaturation and dyspnea, which materially conflicts with resting-only stability assumptions.

hidden_risk_findings.title: Required home oxygen or discharge equipment unavailable tonight
hidden_risk_findings.rationale: Narrative evidence indicates oxygen delivery/logistics are delayed, making planned discharge support unavailable.

hidden_risk_findings.title: No confirmed overnight support for high-friction home environment
hidden_risk_findings.rationale: Narrative evidence indicates the patient is alone overnight without the expected support or caregiver coverage.

output.contradiction_summary: Structured discharge posture was ready. Final reconciled posture is not_ready. Disposition change: Structured baseline 'ready' changed by narrative contradiction: Structured baseline was ready from resting chart data, but note evidence shows exertional desaturation with dyspnea, unavailable home oxygen tonight, and no overnight caregiver support. This contradiction makes discharge home tonight unsafe. No matrix-level manual-review flag is set. This is assistive discharge decision support and does not replace clinician authority.
